no_solution_leakage.reason: The instruction describes what's broken (docstring out of sync with annotations, aliases documented instead of real attributes) but does not specify exact line changes or the specific parameter names to add/remove. The developer must investigate the file to determine what to change.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check structural properties via AST analysis (documented params match annotations, specific annotations exist with correct defaults, aliases not documented) rather than exact text. An alternative fix with different docstring wording or formatting would still pass as long as the structural requirements are met.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests use AST parsing via subprocess to analyze the class structure, checking annotations, defaults, docstring parameter names via regex, and __post_init__ method presence. They also run ruff format/check as subprocesses. This is behavioral/structural verification, not simple text matching.

test_not_tautological.reason: The fail-to-pass tests (test_docstring_params_match_class_annotations, test_new_mamba_params_documented, test_old_deprecated_names_removed) would fail on the original file because the original docstring contains mamba_dt_min etc. as documented params (which are aliases, not annotations) and lacks n_groups, expand, use_conv_bias, chunk_size. A stub/no-op wouldn't fix these mismatches.

behavior_in_tests.reason: The instruction requires: (1) documented params match annotations — tested by test_docstring_params_match_class_annotations; (2) missing annotations added to docstring — tested by test_new_mamba_params_documented; (3) existing params preserved — tested by test_existing_params_preserved; (4) aliases not removed from __post_init__ — tested by test_backward_compat_aliases_in_post_init; (5) ruff format/check — tested by test_ruff_format and test_repo_ruff_check.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are well-organized with clear section comments (Gates, Fail-to-pass, Pass-to-pass, Config-derived, Repo tests), descriptive function names, and docstrings explaining each test's purpose.

structured_data_schema.reason: This task involves editing a Python docstring/configuration class, not producing structured data like JSON/CSV/API/DB.

no_typos.reason: No typos found in filenames, paths, commands, or variable names in instruction.md or test files. (Note: the gold patch has typos like 'Whetehr' and 'CHunk' but those are in the solution, not in the instruction or test infrastructure.)

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: This is a code-only task (editing a Python source file's docstring), not an agent config edit task.
